message:
fix(websocket): fix cancel-safety and pong encoding in split halves

- Clear write_buf eagerly in flush_write_buf before writing, preventing
  duplicate/stale bytes on the wire if recv() is cancelled mid-flush
- Move write_buf.clear() before the pong encoding loop so all pending
  pongs are encoded (not just the last one)
- Add 5 regression tests: cancel-safe flush, multi-pong encoding,
  reunite mismatch/match, writer permit serialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
